item.title: 10 Years Forgotten: Will This Plane Fly Again?
item.description: An aviation restoration project examining an aircraft that has been left unused for more than a decade. The video explores its condition, challenges, and potential return to flight. What would you inspect first before flying it again?

media:content.media:title: 10 Years Forgotten: Will This Plane Fly Again?
media:content.media:description: An aviation restoration project examining an aircraft that has been left unused for more than a decade. The video explores its condition, challenges, and potential return to flight. What would you inspect first before flying it again?

item.title: A Look at a Bold and Unusual Airplane
item.description: A closer look at an unconventional aircraft design, exploring its features, history, and what makes it different from traditional airplanes. What stands out most about this aircraft?

item.title: Everything Is Broken on This $50,000 Plane
item.description: A look at a challenging aircraft project involving major repairs and restoration needs. The video explores the condition of the plane, inspection findings, and possible next steps. What would be the first repair you would tackle?

item.title: Emergency Failure in the Silver Bullet
item.description: Aviation troubleshooting takes center stage as an unexpected failure affects the Silver Bullet aircraft. The video follows the inspection, challenges, and steps taken to understand the issue. What would you check first during an aircraft failure?

item.title: Marvel Mystery Oil in Airplane: Before and After
